response_received: Hey there! I'm doing great — thanks for asking. How about you, 장희님? Having a productive day so far?

response_rendering.content_type: SSE for streaming, WebSocket (ws, status 101) for real-time updates
response_rendering.bubble_style: flat left-aligned response, no visible bubble border, user message right-aligned dark bubble
response_rendering.action_buttons: share, download, copy, retry, thumbs up/down, more

error_ui_patterns.notes: Not tested in this basic run

key_api_endpoints.name: recent_thread_updates
key_api_endpoints.note: Long-polling or SSE for thread updates

warning_pipeline_notes.websocket_note: ws (status 101) detected — Perplexity uses WebSocket for response streaming. This is critical for warning design: SSE mimicking approach confirmed as non-viable (per design docs). WebSocket interception not supported by current Etap architecture.
warning_pipeline_notes.design_doc_reference: Perplexity: PARTIAL (차단O, 경고X) — payload 검증으로 SSE 미믹 실패 (7+ iterations)

notes: Perplexity 응답 정상 수신. WebSocket (status 101, 8.98s) 확인 — 실시간 응답 스트리밍에 WS 사용. design doc에서 PARTIAL 판정된 서비스와 일치. 244개 요청 중 대부분은 추적/분석 스크립트. H2 프로토콜 + WebSocket 하이브리드 구조.
